rationale: Abstract Y uses structured headers matching JICE conventions, explicitly labels findings as 'exploratory,' and adds a 'We sought to' aim sentence—yielding better certainty calibration and journal fit for an n=10 retrospective study.
loser_weakness: Abstract X lacked structured headers expected by JICE and did not label the small-sample findings as exploratory, overstating the certainty of conclusions drawn from 10 patients.
